data.title: Cue Biopharma Announces 1-for-30 Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Cue Biopharma ( (CUE) ) is now available.

Cue Biopharma, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed immunotherapy-focused biotechnology company, moved to adjust its capital structure while maintaining its existing authorized share count and par value, reflecting efforts to preserve financial and listing flexibility. The company’s common stock, options, warrants and equity incentive plan share pools will all be proportionately recalibrated to reflect fewer outstanding shares at a higher per-share price point.

On April 22, 2026, Cue Biopharma filed a Certificate of Amendment in Delaware to implement a 1-for-30 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective as of 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 23, 2026. The reverse split, aimed at regaining compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement, will consolidate every thirty shares into one, compensate fractional holdings in cash, and result in post-split trading beginning April 24, 2026 under the existing ticker with a new CUSIP number.

The most recent analyst rating on (CUE) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cue Biopharma stock, see the CUE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CUE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CUE is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance, driven by persistent losses and negative free cash flow. Offsetting this, technical momentum is strong (though overbought), valuation screens as low on P/E, and a positive corporate event adds incremental support via a $7.5M milestone payment.

To see Spark’s full report on CUE stock, click here.

More about Cue Biopharma

Cue Biopharma, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing targeted biologic drugs to modulate the immune system, particularly in oncology and autoimmune diseases. The company’s common stock is listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the trading symbol CUE, and its capital structure is governed by a Delaware certificate of incorporation.

Average Trading Volume: 9,163,047

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $82.97M

data.title: Aclarion Launches $2.5 Million Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aclarion, Inc. ( (ACON) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Aclarion, Inc.’s board of directors authorized a share repurchase program of up to $2.5 million of its outstanding common stock, with the company planning to execute buybacks over the next 12 months using existing cash and cash equivalents. As of March 31, 2026, Aclarion held about $19 million in cash and cash equivalents, and management said the program reflects confidence in the firm’s valuation and its ability to fund operations through key milestones, while balancing Nociscan growth investment with disciplined capital management.

The repurchases may be conducted through various methods, including open market purchases, privately negotiated transactions, block trades, accelerated share repurchases and 10b5-1 trading plans, and the company is not obligated to buy a specific number of shares and can modify or suspend the program at any time. Executives framed the move as a flexible tool to enhance shareholder value without compromising financial flexibility, signaling Aclarion’s intent to support continued adoption and expansion of its Nociscan platform while actively managing its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (ACON) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aclarion, Inc. stock, see the ACON Stock Forecast page.

More about Aclarion, Inc.

Aclarion, Inc. is a commercial-stage healthcare technology company that leverages magnetic resonance spectroscopy, proprietary signal processing, biomarkers and augmented intelligence algorithms to optimize clinical treatments. The company is initially focused on the chronic low back pain market through its Nociscan SaaS platform, which helps physicians distinguish between painful and nonpainful lumbar discs to improve treatment decisions.

Nociscan operates via a cloud-based connection that receives MRS data from MRI machines for each lumbar disc being evaluated and extracts chemical biomarkers associated with disc pain. These biomarkers are processed through proprietary algorithms to indicate whether a disc may be a source of pain, providing physicians with critical insights into pain location when used alongside other diagnostic tools.

Average Trading Volume: 95,039

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.1M

Find detailed analytics on ACON stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mixed Martial Arts Group Doubles BJJLink’s Latin American Academy Base, Extends Reach to 12 Countries
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Mixed Martial Arts Group ( (MMA) ).

On April 22, 2026, Mixed Martial Arts Group reported that its BJJLink platform doubled its base of paying Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu academies in Latin America over the prior 12 months, rising 107% from 73 to 151 locations between April 2025 and April 2026. Over the same period, BJJLink expanded its regional footprint from nine to 12 countries, adding Argentina, Uruguay and Venezuela to an existing presence that includes Mexico, Chile, Colombia and several other markets.

The company said this acceleration builds on a Latin America strategy launched in March 2025 and on strong operating trends disclosed earlier in April, including 145% year-over-year subscription revenue growth and 141% transaction volume growth to an annualized run-rate of about $16.2 million as of February 2026. Management views Latin America as a key growth pillar for BJJLink and the wider MMA.INC ecosystem, citing the region’s deep cultural ties to Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, fragmented independent gym landscape and rising demand for digital infrastructure as drivers of recurring software revenue, higher payment volumes and tighter relationships with academy operators.

By deepening its reach among Latin American academies, MMA.INC is also seeking to tighten the linkage between real-world training activity and its global digital network, where participation generates on-chain experience points redeemable for rewards. The latest update underscores the company’s push to turn its regional scale into a differentiated, unified platform spanning training, payments, communication and fan engagement for combat sports stakeholders worldwide.

More about Mixed Martial Arts Group

Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited, which trades on the NYSE American as MMA and does business as MMA.INC, operates a technology-driven ecosystem focused on the global combat sports industry. Through assets including BJJLink, TrainAlta, Hype and MixedMartialArts.com, the company connects more than 530,000 user profiles and 75,000+ active students to 18,000 published gyms and 800 verified gyms across 22 countries, offering gym management, community, content and rewards-based training tools.

Average Trading Volume: 440,440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $14.54M

data.title: Standard Lithium Hits Key Arkansas Demo Plant Milestones With 1 Million Barrels of Brine Processed
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Standard Lithium Ltd ( (TSE:SLI) ).

On April 22, 2026, Standard Lithium reported major operational milestones at its large-scale demonstration plant in El Dorado, Arkansas, which runs a full brine-to-lithium carbonate flowsheet built around a commercial-scale direct lithium extraction unit. The facility forms a key part of the company’s U.S. growth strategy in the Smackover Formation and is central to de-risking its South West Arkansas Project.

Since commissioning in 2020, the plant has processed 1 million barrels of real-time brine from the Smackover Formation and completed more than 15,000 DLE cycles using the same technology planned for the South West Arkansas Project. The operation has logged about 340,000 man-hours over six years without a safety incident, strengthening Standard Lithium’s claim to a first-mover advantage in the region and providing critical operational data, design input and training to support future project development and eventual commercial deployment.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SLI) stock is a Buy with a C$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Standard Lithium Ltd stock, see the TSE:SLI Stock Forecast page.

Apollo Real Estate ( (ARI) ) just unveiled an update.

At a special meeting of stockholders held on April 21, 2026, Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. secured strong shareholder approval to sell its commercial real estate loan portfolio to Athene Holding Ltd. under a previously announced asset purchase and sale agreement. The vote, representing about 67.5% of outstanding shares, clears the way for a major repositioning of the company’s balance sheet and marks a pivotal shift in how it deploys capital and manages its real estate credit exposure.

Stockholders also approved issuing shares of common stock to the company’s external manager, ACREFI Management, LLC, in lieu of cash compensation, contingent on the asset sale’s closing and governed by an amended and restated management agreement. This equity-based compensation structure further aligns the manager’s interests with shareholders as Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. transitions its portfolio, while a contingency proposal to adjourn the meeting became unnecessary after the asset sale received sufficient support.

data.title: Microbot Medical Highlights Guidelines Supporting LIBERTY Robotic System
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) is now available.

On April 22, 2026, Microbot Medical highlighted newly updated joint guidelines on occupational protection in interventional radiology issued by the Society of Interventional Radiology and the Cardiovascular and Interventional Radiological Society of Europe. Published in CardioVascular and Interventional Radiology, the guidelines expand safety recommendations for physicians and staff, including new provisions on radiation protection during pregnancy.

The company said the guidelines, now endorsed by at least nine medical societies, underscore the growing focus on reducing radiation exposure and musculoskeletal strain among interventional specialists. This trend aligns with the remote, radiation‑sparing design of Microbot’s LIBERTY robotic system, potentially strengthening its commercial appeal as hospitals seek solutions to health risks, staffing shortages and ergonomic challenges in endovascular and interventional radiology practices.

Microbot also pointed to broader professional backing for occupational radiation protection, including a late‑2025 policy from the American Medical Association calling for stronger safeguards and more research on cumulative exposure. The convergence of clinical guidance and policy support may reinforce demand for technologies like LIBERTY that allow operators to work away from radiation sources and in more ergonomic conditions, with possible implications for workforce retention and increased participation of women in the field.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on transforming endovascular procedures through advanced robotic technology. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the first FDA-cleared single-use, remotely operated robotic solution designed to enhance precision, efficiency and safety in endovascular care.

HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. ( (HTCR) ) has provided an update.

HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. reported that on April 20, 2026, it received written notice from Nasdaq’s Listing Qualifications Department confirming the company had regained compliance with the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement for continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. The company had first been notified of noncompliance on May 6, 2025, and was granted two 180-day grace periods, and with this compliance now restored, its common stock will continue to trade on Nasdaq without interruption, removing a key overhang around potential delisting risk for investors.

The resolution of this bid-price deficiency, formally announced on April 22, 2026, closes a nearly year-long process in which HeartCore worked to meet Nasdaq’s standards and maintain access to U.S. public markets. Continued Nasdaq listing supports the company’s credibility as a U.S. listing advisor to Japanese clients and helps preserve liquidity and visibility for shareholders, reinforcing its positioning in the cross-border IPO consulting niche.

The latest update is out from BRP ( (TSE:DOO) ).

On April 22, 2026, BRP Inc. announced details of its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders, which will be held virtually via live webcast on May 28, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time. Holders of subordinate and multiple voting shares as of the April 16, 2026 record date will be entitled to vote on the company’s audited financial statements for the year ended January 31, 2026, the election of 12 directors, appointment of the independent auditor, and an advisory say-on-pay resolution on executive compensation.

The company is using Canadian notice-and-access procedures for proxy materials, directing shareholders to digital channels for the management proxy circular, financial statements, and related disclosures while allowing paper copies on request, a move that lowers costs and supports environmental goals. BRP outlines detailed instructions for registered and non-registered shareholders to vote and, where desired, appoint and register proxyholders to participate online, emphasizing that proper registration and control numbers are required for voting at the virtual meeting, underscoring a continued shift toward fully digital governance processes.

Tenax Therapeutics ( (TENX) ) has provided an update.

On April 22, 2026, Tenax Therapeutics appointed veteran healthcare finance executive Thomas R. Staab, II as chief financial officer, effective May 11, 2026, succeeding interim CFO Thomas A. McGauley, who will remain in a consulting role through the filing of the company’s March 31, 2026 quarterly report and assist with the transition into late May. The move brings a seasoned public-company dealmaker and biotech finance specialist onto the leadership team as Tenax scales its global registrational program for levosimendan and positions TNX-103 as a potential first-in-class therapy for PH-HFpEF, with Staab’s compensation package anchored by inducement equity awards that align his incentives with long-term shareholder value.

Under Staab’s employment agreement, Tenax granted him 10,000 restricted stock units and options to purchase 450,000 shares, with multi-stage vesting schedules tied to his continued service. The company also structured tiered severance protections, including enhanced benefits in the event of a corporate transaction, underscoring both the strategic importance of the CFO role at this stage of Tenax’s development and the potential for future corporate or strategic activity in a competitive cardiopulmonary drug development landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (TENX) stock is a Buy with a $35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tenax Therapeutics stock, see the TENX Stock Forecast page.

Axe Compute Inc ( (AGPU) ) has shared an update.

On April 22, 2026, Axe Compute Inc. announced it has signed a 36‑month enterprise infrastructure contract worth approximately $260 million with an unnamed customer, marking the largest enterprise engagement in its history. Under the agreement, Axe Compute will deploy a dedicated cluster of 2,304 NVIDIA B300 GPUs, AI‑focused high‑speed storage, and 4.8 megawatts of N+1 redundant power in a single U.S. Tier 3 data center, with deployment targeted to begin in the third quarter of 2026 and options to renew beyond the initial term.

The contract, structured with a deposit, prepayment, and take‑or‑pay monthly payments backed by enterprise‑grade service levels, provides Axe Compute with meaningful multi‑year revenue visibility and underscores its strategy of offering dedicated, customer‑specified AI infrastructure rather than shared cloud capacity. Management frames the deal as evidence of a structural shift in enterprise AI procurement away from hyperscaler constraints, potentially strengthening Axe Compute’s competitive position as enterprises seek predictable, scalable GPU resources for foundation model training, fine‑tuning, and high‑throughput inference at scale.

Spark’s Take on AGPU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AGPU is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by severe financial deterioration (major 2025 revenue collapse, persistent large losses, and multi-year negative operating/free cash flow). Technicals provide some offset with improving medium-term momentum (price above key short/intermediate moving averages and positive MACD), while valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AGPU stock, click here.

More about Axe Compute Inc

Axe Compute Inc., traded on Nasdaq under the ticker AGPU, operates as a “neocloud” AI infrastructure platform focused on delivering dedicated enterprise GPU compute capacity at global scale. The company provides enterprises and AI developers with configurable hardware, geographic flexibility, and rapid deployment, including a Strategic Compute Reserve that converts reserved GPU holdings into on-demand, deployable AI infrastructure capacity.

Positioning itself as an alternative to traditional hyperscale cloud providers, Axe Compute emphasizes dedicated clusters, predictable pricing, and customer-specified locations and service levels. Its offerings are geared toward large-scale AI model training, fine-tuning, and high-throughput inference workloads, targeting enterprises that require performance, data-control, and reliability guarantees for mission-critical AI applications.

Capone was granted 200,000 restricted stock units under the company’s long‑term incentive plan, with 50% vesting on April 1, 2026 and the remainder on April 1, 2027, and all equity vesting upon a change of control. The agreement maintains his at‑will employment status but provides for 12 months of salary continuation, extended benefits, and accelerated vesting of equity if he is terminated without cause or resigns for good reason, underscoring Spectral AI’s effort to secure and align its top leadership during a period that could include strategic transactions.

T Rowe Price ( (TROW) ) has issued an update.

On April 22, 2026, T. Rowe Price Group and its alternatives affiliate Oak Hill Advisors updated their evergreen operating arrangement, reinforcing OHA’s role as a leading alternatives manager to institutional, insurance, wealth, and retirement clients. The move underscores T. Rowe Price’s commitment to expanding its alternatives franchise and aligning OHA’s long‑term growth with the broader group’s multi‑asset offering.

On April 21, 2026, the board’s independent directors approved an amended and restated employment agreement for OHA CEO Glenn R. August, detailing continued employment, a $350,000 base salary, performance‑linked bonus eligibility, and defined severance protections tied to non‑compete and non‑solicitation covenants. The compensation committee also adopted an OHA 2026 Partner Cash Compensation Pool Plan, a Supplemental Compensation Pool funded up to $20 million annually from 2027 to 2030, and a Value Creation Incentive Plan, tightly linking partner and executive pay, including equity deferrals, to OHA’s fee revenue growth and fee‑related earnings performance.

Under these plans, August receives a 16.333% allocation from the 2027 OHA Partner Cash Compensation Pool and an 8.166% share of the 2027 Value Creation Incentive Pool, integrating his rewards with both annual cash flows and longer‑term value creation at OHA. The revamped compensation architecture is designed to retain key talent, sharpen performance incentives, and better synchronize OHA leadership’s interests with those of T. New Found Gold ( (TSE:NFG) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 22, 2026, New Found Gold reported final 2025 drill results from the Dropkick Zone at Queensway, showing strong high-grade intercepts both west and east of the Appleton Fault Zone. The company has expanded the Dropkick mineralized trend to over 1.4 kilometres along strike and to depths of about 300 metres, with the high-grade domain demonstrating continuity and remaining open in multiple directions.

Drilling at Dropkick in 2024 and 2025, totaling more than 16,000 metres, will feed into an updated Queensway mineral resource estimate and technical report planned for the second half of 2026. Farmers National Banc Corp., a community-focused financial services provider in Ohio and Pennsylvania, expanded its scale to $7.18 billion in assets by March 31, 2026, driven largely by its acquisition of Middlefield Banc Corp. on March 2, 2026. The combination added significant loans, deposits and equity, while slightly elevating nonperforming loans, and is intended to deepen Farmers’ competitive position in its regional markets, especially Columbus.

On April 22, 2026, Farmers reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $16.3 million, or $0.36 per diluted share, which rose to $20.0 million, or $0.45 per share, on an adjusted basis excluding $4.0 million of Middlefield acquisition and core conversion costs. The quarter marked the company’s 173rd consecutive period of profitability, featured higher net interest income and margin, stronger noninterest revenue lines and modest credit cost recoveries, offset by higher operating expenses tied to integration and technology conversion efforts that management expects to complete in the third quarter of 2026.
